title: Collapse nested if in fetch_profile/1 into a with expression
prompt: Refactor MyApp.UserService.fetch_profile/1 in test_fixtures/ruby_style_user_service.ex to use a `with` expression. The three levels of `if is_nil(...)` and `if user.active == true` should be expressed as `with` clauses that short-circuit to the appropriate error tuples. Output only the `fetch_profile/1` function inside a `defmodule MyApp.UserService do ... end` module.
tier_rationale: Single well-known refactor pattern; the three checks map cleanly to `with` clauses. Classic Claude slip where it keeps the if spine; easy tier because the transformation is pattern-matched to a common textbook refactor.
